stocks.impact_theory: Broadcom's Q1 FY2026 earnings release after market close on March 4 drove hype around AI chip demand and data center growth amid broader tech rebound from Iran tensions. Economic implications include sustained AI capex boosting semis sector despite macro volatility; market psychology shifted to optimism on tech resilience. Historical parallels: NVDA post-earnings rallies in 2023-24. Analogies: Like a rocket booster igniting amid storm clouds (geopolitics), or a lighthouse steady in turbulent seas.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings expected at $2.02 EPS, 28% revenue growth; X sentiment positive on AI/data center; web news highlights buy before March 4. Tech rally supports.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Buy/long for 5-10% gains on earnings beat, target $300.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Avoid or short if miss, potential 3-5% drop.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Earnings miss, AI slowdown, escalation in Iran raising rates/oil.

stocks.justification: Strong pre-earnings momentum, consensus beats history, AI tailwinds confirmed in news/X.

stocks.impact_theory: Coinbase surged 5.9% premarket on March 4 amid market rebound from jobs data and easing Iran fears, boosting crypto sentiment as BTC safe-haven. Implications: Crypto rotation in risk-on; psychology of dip-buying post-volatility. Parallels: 2024 crypto rallies post-halving. Analogies: Phoenix rising from volatility ashes, or tide lifting all boats in risk rebound.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: X posts highlight +5.9% premarket, strong jobs data; web movers list as top gainer; crypto tied to market sentiment shift.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Long for 8% upside to $270 on continued rebound.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Short if BTC dumps, 5% loss potential.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical escalation hurting risk assets, regulatory news.

stocks.justification: Clear gainer in snippets/X, but crypto volatility tempers highest confidence.

stocks.impact_theory: ANF sank post-Q4 earnings beat on March 4 due to weak guidance amid consumer spending caution from Iran oil spike/inflation fears. Implications: Retail rotation out; psychology sell-the-news. Parallels: Lululemon post-earnings drops 2024. Analogies: Balloon deflating after hype, or sugar rush crash.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Earnings beat but stock sinks; Yahoo news confirms; X/trending negative.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Avoid, or dip buy if oversold for 5% rebound.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Strong consumer data surprise, broader retail rally.

stocks.justification: Clear post-earnings reaction in news, consistent bearish sentiment.

stocks.impact_theory: PANW cut FY2026 forecast despite earnings, sparking growth fears in cybersecurity amid macro uncertainty. Implications: Software punished on guidance; fear of spending cuts. Parallels: SNOW/ZS misses 2024. Analogies: Car braking hard on highway, or rain on parade.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Yahoo live earnings: sinks after cuts to $5.6B vs expected; web confirms.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Cyber demand surge from geopolitics, beat lowered expectations.

stocks.justification: Direct from earnings news, high volume reaction.

stocks.impact_theory: MDB cratered 22% on March 3 on weak guidance amid software selloff, extended on March 4 volatility. Implications: Cloud/software growth slowdown; psychology of dispersion in earnings. Parallels: CRM guidance misses. Analogies: Icarus flying too close to sun, or domino falling in chain.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Yahoo: -22% on Tue; X mentions crater; ongoing sentiment negative.

potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Tech rebound lifts all, positive AI/database news.

stocks.justification: Sharp move confirmed, but could stabilize in rebound.
